title: median function breaks when the column contains NULL values
poc: CREATE TABLE mtcars ( rownames VARCHAR(255) , mpg DOUBLE PRECISION , cyl DOUBLE PRECISION , disp DOUBLE PRECISION , hp DOUBLE PRECISION , drat DOUBLE PRECISION , wt DOUBLE PRECISION , qsec DOUBLE PRECISION , vs DOUBLE PRECISION , am DOUBLE PRECISION , gear DOUBLE PRECISION , carb DOUBLE PRECISION ) ;
UPDATE mtcars SET mpg = NULL WHERE cyl = 6 ;
select sum( mpg ) , min( mpg ) , max( mpg ) from mtcars ;
key_bug_features: median function fails with NULL values in column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_median ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value DOUBLE PRECISION, category VARCHAR(50) );
UPDATE test_median SET value = NULL WHERE category = 'A';
SELECT median(value) FROM test_median WHERE category = 'B';
SELECT median(value) FROM test_median WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
